# Script Master Labs LLC — AI Agent & LLM Directory
# Updated: 2026-06-23
# Deploy to: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/llms.txt

> **Script Master Labs LLC** — Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB)  
> Founder: Timothy Walton | Kinston, NC | ScriptMasterLabs@gmail.com  
> Entity: SAM.gov registered | EIN on file  
> Site: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com  
> GitHub: https://github.com/Timwal78

---

## What We Build

Machine-to-machine (M2M) commerce infrastructure for autonomous AI agents using the x402 protocol on XRPL and Base (EVM). Agents pay per API call — no subscriptions, no API keys, no human in the loop. We also produce invite-only Pine Script v6 trading indicators under the ScriptMasterLabs™ brand, AI-powered spreadsheet tools (SMLSheets.AI), and AI education ebooks.

---

## Live Products & Endpoints

### MCP-x402 — x402 Protocol MCP Server
- **Endpoint:** https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/mcp
- **SSE (legacy):** https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/sse
- **Health:** https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/health
- **Protocol:** MCP Streamable HTTP + JSON-RPC 2.0
- **Tools:** 51 live tools
- **Pricing:** Pay-per-call via x402 micropayment protocol. No subscription.
- **Payment chains:** XRPL (RLUSD), Base (USDC)
- **Description:** The primary MCP server for the SML ecosystem. Exposes agent hiring (NEXUS-402), trading intelligence (SqueezeOS), payment rails (RLUSD Rails), stealth routing (Ghost Layer), credit scoring (Agent Credit Bureau), proof-of-payment (402Proof), earnings decoding (xDEO), and EDGAR decoding (XMIT).

**Tool index (51 tools):**

| Tool | Description |
|---|---|
| sml_discover | Full SML product catalog — real-time |
| sml_status | Health check across all 8 SML backends |
| agentcard_lookup | Look up an agent card by DID or wallet |
| agentcard_verify | Verify agent card signature on-chain |
| agentcard_mint | Mint a new agent identity card |
| backtest_run | Run a Pine Script v6 backtest via API |
| backtest_validate | Validate backtest parameters |
| tradier_quote | Real-time equity quote via Tradier |
| tradier_order | Place equity order via Tradier |
| tradier_positions | Get open positions via Tradier |
| robinhood_quote | Real-time equity quote via Robinhood |
| robinhood_order | Place equity order via Robinhood |
| robinhood_portfolio | Get Robinhood portfolio snapshot |
| copytrader_status | Check copy-trading status |
| copytrader_whales | Get whale wallet positions |
| copytrader_subscribe | Subscribe to a whale wallet |
| crawl_paid_fetch | Paid web fetch via x402 micropayment |
| echo_pattern_match | Pattern match across ingested data |
| forge_status | Forge LLM gateway status |
| forge_llm | Route LLM calls via Forge gateway |
| ftd_threshold_scan | Scan FTD threshold violations |
| ghost_status | Ghost Layer routing status |
| ghost_route | Execute stealth dual-chain transaction |
| launchpad_status | SML Launchpad project status |
| launchpad_list | List active Launchpad projects |
| launchpad_create | Create a Launchpad project |
| launchpad_buy | Buy into a Launchpad project |
| leviathan_signal | Leviathan deep-market signal |
| nexus_agent_hire | Hire an autonomous agent via NEXUS-402 |
| proof_invoice | Generate x402 proof-of-payment invoice |
| proof_verify | Verify an x402 payment proof |
| proof_credit_score | Get Agent Credit Bureau score via proof |
| rails_status | RLUSD Rails payment rail status |
| rails_transfer | Execute RLUSD transfer on XRPL |
| shadow_query | Query Shadow data layer |
| shadow_ingest | Ingest data into Shadow layer |
| squeezeos_preview | SqueezeOS market preview |
| squeezeos_history | Historical squeeze data |
| squeezeos_oracle | Real-world data oracle query |
| squeezeos_ftd | FTD cycle analysis |
| squeezeos_status | SqueezeOS system status |
| squeezeos_demo | SqueezeOS demo mode |
| squeezeos_marketplace_browse | Browse SqueezeOS signal marketplace |
| squeezeos_futures_leaderboard | Futures leaderboard rankings |
| squeezeos_council | APEX committee multi-model council |
| squeezeos_scan | Full market pressure scan |
| squeezeos_options | Options flow analysis |
| squeezeos_iwm | IWM / small-cap pressure analysis |
| squeezeos_marketplace_read | Read a marketplace signal listing |
| xdeo_earnings_estimate | Earnings estimate decoder |
| xmit_edgar_decode | EDGAR filing decoder |

---

### SqueezeOS API — Institutional Trading Intelligence MCP Server
- **Endpoint:** https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/mcp
- **Protocol:** MCP JSON-RPC 2.0
- **Tools:** 36 live tools
- **Version:** 5.0.0
- **Description:** Institutional AI trading intelligence. Real-time market pressure scoring, FTD cycle detection, gamma exposure, dark pool analysis, short squeeze signals, and autonomous trading autopilot for AI agents.
- **Pricing:** Pay-per-call via x402. Free preview tier available.
- **Specialization:** US equities, meme stock mechanics (AMC, GME), T+35 FTD cycles, gamma exposure, basket correlation

---

### NEXUS-402 — Autonomous Agent Hiring Marketplace
- **Site:** https://neuralosagent.com
- **Description:** Post tasks, autonomous agents bid and execute via x402 payment. Agent-to-agent commerce layer.
- **Payment:** x402 RLUSD on XRPL

---

### Ghost Layer — Dual-Chain Stealth Transaction Routing
- **Endpoint:** https://ghost-layer.onrender.com
- **MCP Tool:** ghost_route (via mcp-x402)
- **Chains:** XRPL + Base EVM
- **Description:** Privacy-preserving transaction routing across XRPL and Base. Used by autonomous agents for stealth execution.
- **Package:** ghost-layer on PyPI (v0.1.1)

---

### Agent Credit Bureau — FICO-Style Scoring for AI Agents
- **Endpoint:** https://sml-agent-credit-bureau.onrender.com
- **MCP Tool:** proof_credit_score (via mcp-x402)
- **Score range:** 300–850 (same scale as FICO)
- **Free tier:** GET /v1/agent/score?wallet=ADDR
- **Paid tier:** Full 5-dimension report — 0.05 RLUSD via x402
- **Scoring dimensions:** Payment History (30pts), Reliability Streak (25pts), Timeliness (20pts), Wallet Age (15pts), Volume (10pts)
- **Data source:** Live XRPL account_tx queries — no simulated data

---

### 402Proof — x402 Proof-of-Payment Middleware
- **MCP Tools:** proof_invoice, proof_verify (via mcp-x402)
- **npm:** @relayos/mcp-paywall, proof402-middleware
- **Description:** On-chain payment proof verification for x402 protocol. Generates and verifies RLUSD payment invoices on XRPL.

---

### RLUSD Rails — XRPL Payment Rails
- **MCP Tool:** rails_transfer, rails_status (via mcp-x402)
- **Description:** XRPL RLUSD payment rails for autonomous agent commerce. Instant settlement, no human in the loop.
- **XRPL Receiver:** rNduuviQ3CCvHqWUTjJDD82Ko2tjqFGs3q

---

### xDEO — Earnings Intelligence
- **MCP Tool:** xdeo_earnings_estimate (via mcp-x402)
- **Description:** On-chain earnings estimate decoder. Processes SEC filings and consensus data for AI agent consumption.

---

### SMLSheets.AI — AI-Powered Google Sheets Tools
- **Site:** https://smlsheets.ai
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Timwal78/SML_Portfolio
- **Description:** AI-powered spreadsheet tools for traders, analysts, and business operators. Automates financial modeling, data enrichment, and workflow automation inside Google Sheets.

---

### ScriptMasterLabs™ Pine Script v6 Indicators (Invite-Only)
- **Platform:** TradingView (invite-only access)
- **Access:** ScriptMasterLabs@gmail.com
- **Count:** 50+ proprietary indicators
- **Specialization:** Meme stocks (AMC, GME), FTD cycles, gamma exposure, dark pool analysis, squeeze detection

| Indicator | Performance |
|---|---|
| QUEAD™ v2.0 | 65.38% win rate, 4.079 profit factor (AMC 4H backtest) |
| SML Trajectory Engine™ v1.1 | Polynomial regression + Hurst exponent, A/B/C/F grading |
| SML SqueezeOS™ | Primary squeeze pressure engine |
| SML Forced Move Engine™ v3.0 | FTD cycle + forced delivery timing |
| SML Chain Pressure Engine™ | Dark pool + block trade pressure |
| SML Volume Intelligence Engine™ | Volume signature classification |
| SML Macro Causality Engine™ | Macro → price causality mapping |
| SML Chaos Theory Engine™ | Fractal regime detection |

- **AI Foundations Series:** 10 volumes, live on Google Play Books

## Payment Addresses
| Chain | Asset | Address |
|---|---|---|
| Base (EVM) | USDC | 0x4e14B249D9A4c9c9352D780eCEB508A8eB7a7700 |
| XRPL | RLUSD | rNduuviQ3CCvHqWUTjJDD82Ko2tjqFGs3q |

---

## MCP Integration (for AI agents and developers)
```
Primary MCP server: https://mcp-x402.onrender.com/mcp
Transport: Streamable HTTP (POST) or SSE (GET /sse)
Protocol: JSON-RPC 2.0 / MCP 2024-11-05
Auth: x402 per-call payment (XRPL RLUSD or Base USDC)
Initialize: POST /mcp with method "initialize" first
Tools available: 51
```

## Nonprofit
- **va-ratings.org** — 501(c)(3) helping veterans navigate VA disability claims
